svg.title: Clock phase — good vs bad alignment using rising edge sampling
svg.desc: Two timing diagrams. Top: good phase — rising edge lands at center of each bit, clean latch. Bottom: bad phase — rising edge lands on a transition, ambiguous latch.
svg.text: Good phase — rising edge at bit center → clean latch
Bad phase — rising edge on transition → ambiguous latch
rising edge = latch trigger (receiver "reads" data here)
sample point in stable zone → clean 0 or 1
sample point on transition → metastable / wrong bit
transition danger zone (signal is between 0 and 1)
